name: Base64 — History, Batch, JWT, Image Transform

features.label: Deprecated escape/unescape Removed
features.desc: utils.js now uses TextEncoder/TextDecoder — no more deprecated escape() and unescape() calls.

features.label: Operation History
features.desc: Last 10 encode/decode operations saved per session.

features.label: Batch Mode
features.desc: Encode or decode multiple strings at once — one per line.

features.label: Copy as Code
features.desc: Copy encoded Base64 as a variable in JS, TypeScript, Python, Java, Go, or C#.

features.label: Image Resize + Quality + Format
features.desc: Before encoding: resize to custom dimensions, set JPEG quality, convert format.

features.label: Multiple Images → JSON Array
features.desc: Upload multiple images → all encoded to Base64 as a JSON array.

features.label: JWT Decoder Tab
features.desc: Paste any JWT → colored token display, header/payload/signature, claims table, expiry check.
